ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the participant */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event takes place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Fee for event registration */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the event can accommodate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event's ID */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* The actual finishing time recorded for the participant */,
  "donuts_ate" INTEGER /* The number of donuts eaten by the participant during the race */,
  "time_adjustment" TEXT /* Time adjustment made to the actual time based on participant's performance factors */,
  "adjusted_time" TEXT /* The final adjusted time after considering the time adjustment */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Final placement of the participant in the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the participant */,
  "nutrition_consumption" TEXT /* Details of any nutrition consumed during the event */,
  "time_penalty" TEXT /* Any time penalties applied */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time after all adjustments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_time_adjustment FOREIGN KEY ("time_adjustment") REFERENCES adjustments ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range definition */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment criteria */,
  "time_adjustment" TEXT /* Value of time adjustment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the adjustment is currently active */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timers" (
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the timer or official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the timer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the timer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the timer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the timer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the timer is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the sponsor organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sponsors" (
  "event_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-sponsor relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event's ID */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsor's ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
